megablocks.title: Western Line Sunday Maintenance Block
megablocks.description: Complete block for track maintenance, signal upgrades, and OHE work. No suburban services on Western Line.
megablocks.alternative: BEST buses on Western Express Highway; Night auto/cab services at major stations

megablocks.title: Central Line Sunday Night Block
megablocks.description: OHE (overhead electric) maintenance block. Reduced frequency and extended journey times during this window.
megablocks.alternative: BEST buses on Eastern Express Highway; limited MSRTC services

megablocks.title: Harbour Line Monthly Mega Block
megablocks.description: Track renewal and bridge inspection work. All Harbour Line services suspended during block.
megablocks.alternative: NMMT AC buses on Vashi–Panvel corridor; share autos from Vashi

megablocks.title: Western Line Pre-monsoon Track Inspection
megablocks.description: Annual pre-monsoon inspection of bridges and embankments between Borivali and Virar.
megablocks.alternative: BEST buses from Borivali; local auto-rickshaws

megablocks.title: Central Line Track Doubling Work – Diva
megablocks.description: Track doubling project work at Diva junction. Services beyond Thane may be affected.
megablocks.alternative: MSRTC buses from Thane to Dombivali/Kalyan
